reviews.review_description: The app will not start and a little window pops up that can't be interacted with that states I don't have a license but there is no option anywhere that I can see that gives me the ootion to get one.  Idk it don't work 🤷‍♂️

developer_response.body: Hello, Eclipse Creator is available to licence from FourPlus. Please visit www.eclipsecreator.com to enquire about licensing for training organisations.
